who: accounting firm partners overseeing 5–15 client engagements
offer: For accounting firm partners processing 5–15 client engagements, missed deadlines cause client dissatisfaction. We provide a compliance tracking application instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Difficulty in tracking compliance across multiple client engagements and deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firm partners
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firm partners with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among accounting partners
try_it: Let users try deadline reminders and audit tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline the onboarding process with fewer steps
